notes.scope: Windsurf-only optional MCP. Do not merge into other host configs by default.
beforeUse: Build mcps/mcp-subagent with npm install && npm run build.
Keep the default install:config dry-run first; it updates only the receiver's Windsurf MCP configuration when --apply is supplied.
Confirm the backup and rollback path before applying, and use only with an active signed-in Windsurf Cascade session.
